title: AL's Squids & Nautiluses x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Squids & Nautiluses compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9317544e41d2f6edfa84fbe814f27e686211fa3.png)

# 

This pack requires:

*Fresh Animations



This pack makes AL's Squids & Nautiluses compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!



Since AL's Squids & Nautiluses uses a custom texture for it's Squid and Glow Squid, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!



Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

Also note that, as of right now, only the Squid and Glow Squid are animated by FA so the Nautiluses are the same as the non-FA version.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
